CVE-2021-36370.title: An issue was discovered in Midnight Commander through 4.8.26. Whe ...
CVE-2021-36370.description: An issue was discovered in Midnight Commander through 4.8.26. When establishing an SFTP connection, the fingerprint of the server is neither checked nor displayed. As a result, a user connects to the server without the ability to verify its authenticity.
